description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a green stem on top, featuring a classic carved jack-o'-lantern face. The carving includes a triangular eye and a jagged, smiling mouth, both cut through the pumpkin's thick rind, revealing a hollow, yellow-lit interior. The pumpkin's surface is ribbed with natural grooves and subtle shading, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. The stem is short, thick, and slightly angled, colored in a deep green. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, showing only the smooth, ribbed orange surface. The overall look is festive and typical for Halloween decorations in urban outdoor settings.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a green stem and a classic jack-o'-lantern face carved into one side, showing a triangular eye and jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with its carved face visible, displaying a triangular eye and a jagged, smiling mouth.
description_view_1: The pumpkin is viewed from the back, showing only the smooth, ribbed orange surface and the green stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_2: A side view of the pumpkin, highlighting the ribbed orange surface and green stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_3: The pumpkin is angled to show part of the carved face, with the triangular eye and a portion of the jagged mouth visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with a single triangular eye and a jagged, smiling mouth cut into the front. The design is simple and geometric, with no additional motifs or etchings.
